title: MCLN EX57 Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 right 309880 EX 57 – Receiving Scan Rate Capture Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 57 – Receiving Scan Rate Capture Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Add EX57 System Code PAGEREF _Toc188003442 \h 3 2. Enable Transaction Parameter PAGEREF _Toc188003443 \h 4 3. Post Configuration Instructions   PAGEREF _Toc188003444 \h 6 4. Questions and Answers  PAGEREF _Toc188003445 \h 7 Add EX57 System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX57 Code ID : Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to Transactions UI. And filter for Receiving transactions * Recv * . Select NEW Recv -Mixed Item and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Select the NEW Recv -Mixed Item transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter & enable it . Then click Save . Follow steps e and f for the remaining RF Receiving transactions in use Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken

[Document: MCLN EX57 Configuration Guide]

center 83548 right 309880 EX 57 – Receiving Scan Rate Capture Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 57 – Receiving Scan Rate Capture Configuration Guide Table of Contents  1. Add EX57 System Code  2. Enable Transaction Parameter  3. Post Configuration Instructions    4. Questions and Answers   Add EX57 System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX57 Code ID : Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to Transactions UI. And filter for Receiving transactions * Recv * . Select NEW Recv -Mixed Item and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Select the NEW Recv -Mixed Item transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter & enable it . Then click Save . Follow steps e and f for the remaining RF Receiving transactions in use Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken
